title: Platform incident update from monday.com
excerpt:
Hi all, Jasmine Hammond here–a Community Manager with monday.com, where I focus on our regional communities! 
Earlier today, our US server was experiencing connectivity issues. We apologize for any inconvenience this may…

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all, Jasmine Hammond here–a Community Manager with monday.com, where I focus on our regional communities!

Earlier today, our US server was experiencing connectivity issues. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused. At this time, our team has deployed a fix for the issue and are continuing to monitor the outcome to ensure full platform stability. You can follow updates on our progress at https://status.monday.com/

posts.author: Jorge (Jorge)
posts.cookedHtml: It was sluggish for me 15 minutes ago, now it stopped working altogether with an “Unsupported location” error message.

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Jorge, @vostefan! Thank you for sharing and we apologize again for the inconvenience. The monday team is working diligently on this issue. We will be in touch with updates as they come.

Feel free to follow updates live here, as well: https://status.monday.com/

posts.author: frossini (Fab Rossini)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, according to the status page, the automations incident was resolved but still, none of the automations on my account are working. Is it related to another issue?

status.monday.com

Investigating issues with Dashboards, Automations, API, and Search

monday.com's Status Page - Investigating issues with Dashboards, Automations, API, and Search.

posts.author: JasHam (Jasmine Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi all, we have an update from the monday team: A fix has been implemented at this time. We are still monitoring to ensure full stability. Note: API, automations, Search, Dashboards are currently experiencing delays due to this issue. We appreciate your patience and please feel free to continue to follow updates here: https://status.monday.com/
